name: Facebook
description: Facebook is a social networking service for connecting with people, sharing posts, photos, and videos, and joining communities.

years.notes: Original 'f' favicon on dark blue rounded square (used 2005-2019). Wordmark by Mike Buzzard / Cuban Council based on Klavika (Eric Olson) is 266×100 — illegible scaled into 24×24, so the contemporaneous 'f' mark is used instead per acquisition guidance. Decorative #6D84B4 chrome stripe from the source asset removed.

2015 wordmark refresh (July 1, 2015): refined letterforms, tighter 'a/c/e' geometry, on the same #3B5998 dark blue. Scale-wrapped from 266×100 into 24×24 — text reads small. Note: #1877F2 was not introduced until the May 2019 brand refresh; in 2015 the brand color was still #3B5998.
Current 'f' on blue square (2019 brand refresh).
